sections.title: Attempting to milk a dairy cow without a bucket

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats the Milkmaid
lines.text: Tee hee! You've never milked a cow before, have you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... No. How could you tell?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats the Milkmaid
lines.text: Because you're spilling milk all over the floor. What a waste! You need something to hold the milk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah yes, I really should have guessed that one, shouldn't I?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats the Milkmaid
lines.text: You're from the city, aren't you... Try it again with an empty bucket.

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: Hello, I'm Gillie the Milkmaid. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: My name is Gillie Groats. My father is a farmer and I milk the cows for him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any buckets of milk spare?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: I'm afraid not. We need all of our milk to sell to market, but you can milk the cow yourself if you need the milk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do you get milk from a cow then?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: It's very easy. First you need an empty bucket to hold the milk.

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: Then find a dairy cow to milk - you can't milk just any cow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I find a dairy cow?

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: They are easy to spot - they are dark brown and white, unlike beef cows, which are light brown and white. We also tether them to a post to stop them wandering around all over the place.

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: There are a couple very near, in this field.

lines.speaker: Gillie Groats
lines.text: Then just milk the cow and your bucket will fill with tasty, nutritious milk.
